name: Red and White Peppermint Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 oz.) package reduced fat white cake mix
1 cup (from a 16-ounce can) reduced-fat vanilla frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8 x 8 or 9 x 9 inch pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix until moistened; beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Stir in the crushed candy. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 25 to 35 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan and springs back when touched lightly in the center.
6. Cool completely.
7. Spread frosting over the cooled cake; sprinkle with 1 to 2 tablespoons crushed candy.
Makes 9 servings.
